title: andrographis rothii
intro: Andrographis rothii, also known as Himalayan King of Bitters, is a plant species belonging to the family Acanthaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in Ayurvedic and Unani systems, due to its bitter and pungent taste. The plant contains bioactive compounds such as andrographolides and flavonoids, which have been found to have anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. Herbal preparations of Andrographis rothii, including teas, capsules, and extracts, are used to treat various health conditions, including fever, digestive issues, and respiratory problems, offering benefits such as reduced inflammation, improved immune function, and enhanced overall well-being.
